Free trial details and billing model
Publishing cadence per plan
Support contact and onboarding help

faq.question: How fast can merchants start publishing?
faq.answer: Most merchants can complete setup quickly and prepare their first automated publishing workflow the same day.

faq.question: Is autoBlogger AI free?
faq.answer: autoBlogger includes a 14-day free trial through the Shopify App Store. There is no ongoing free plan after the trial.

faq.question: Is autoBlogger available for Shopify?
faq.answer: Yes. autoBlogger is a Shopify app and is installed from the Shopify App Store.

faq.question: What should I look for in a Shopify blog automation app?
faq.answer: Look for recurring publishing, metadata, FAQ content, product links, readable article structure, and simple editing after publishing.

faq.question: Can autoBlogger add internal product links?
faq.answer: Yes. autoBlogger can include internal product links in generated posts so blog content supports product and collection discovery.

faq.question: Can content be edited after publishing?
faq.answer: Yes. Merchants can edit generated posts directly in Shopify at any time.

title: Shopify Fake Review Update: Why Honest Developers Are Excited
description: Ollie, owner and developer of the autoBlogger apps, reacts to Shopify's fake and incentivized review update for the App Store.
heading: Shopify's Fake Review Update Is the Movement Honest App Developers Needed
intro: By Ollie Hermans, owner and developer of the autoBlogger apps. After years of raising concerns about fake and incentivized Shopify App Store reviews, I am excited to see Shopify moving on this.
bullets: Shopify is tightening rules around incentivized app reviews
Fake-review detection is being expanded across old and new Shopify App Store reviews
Honest developers finally have real movement to watch

faq.question: What changed with Shopify App Store reviews?
faq.answer: Shopify announced clearer rules against incentivized reviews and stronger fake-review detection across both existing and new reviews.

faq.question: Why does this matter to merchants?
faq.answer: Merchants use reviews to decide which apps to trust. Cleaner review signals should make it easier to compare apps on real merchant experience.

faq.question: Why is Ollie writing about Shopify fake reviews?
faq.answer: Ollie owns and develops the autoBlogger apps and has spent years raising concerns about fake and incentivized reviews on the Shopify App Store.
